name: ASUS TUF GAMING Z690-PLUS WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR5-6000(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 4x M.2 Slots - USB 3,2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - HDMI - DisplayPort - Intel 2.5GbE LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6E - BT 5.2
shortName: ASUS TUF GAMING Z690-PLUS WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: ATX Intel Z690 gaming motherboard with PCIe 5.0, DDR5-6000 support, and WiFi 6E.
